items: Jac Caglianone homered 2 times, driving in 3 as Kansas City beat Tampa Bay, 12-5.
Sonny Gray held down Colorado for 7.0 innings, striking out 11 in Boston's 5-2 win.
Jesús Luzardo struck out 13 in 6.2 innings as Philadelphia topped Washington, 14-9.
Edmundo Sosa had 5 RBI, with 1 home run as Philadelphia beat Washington, 14-9.
Milwaukee pitching combined to shut out Cincinnati, 2-0.
San Diego walked off Atlanta, 7-6 — one of 2 one-run finishes across the league.
